datastores.evidence: Found SSN-format strings in 7/10 sampled objects; email + full name combinations in 9/10
datastores.recommendation: Enable SSE-KMS encryption, attach restrictive bucket policy, enable Block Public Access

datastores.evidence: Detected credit card PANs (Luhn-valid) and IBAN strings in 8/10 sampled archives
datastores.recommendation: Enable SSE-KMS, turn on versioning + Object Lock, restrict to PCI-scoped IAM roles

datastores.evidence: Rows contain ICD-10 codes, patient identifiers, and diagnosis free-text in 10/10 sampled rows
datastores.recommendation: Disable public accessibility, place behind a private subnet, restrict to HIPAA-scoped roles

datastores.evidence: Items contain charge_amount, last4_cc, and merchant_id in 9/10 sampled items
datastores.recommendation: Enable encryption at rest with customer-managed KMS, restrict global table replicas to PCI regions

datastores.evidence: Columns include salary, tax_id, and bank_account in 10/10 sampled rows
datastores.recommendation: Enable automated backups with 30-day retention, rotate KMS key, enforce least-privilege role

datastores.evidence: Items contain user_email and session_token fields in 10/10 sampled items
datastores.recommendation: Set TTL to 24h, enable PITR, rotate session signing key quarterly

datastores.evidence: Sampled rows contain aggregate counts and anonymized identifiers; insufficient signal for confident classification
datastores.recommendation: Re-run with expanded sample size; verify anonymization invariants documented

datastores.evidence: All 10 samples are PNG/JPG marketing collateral with no detected sensitive content
datastores.recommendation: No action required; current public-read ACL is intentional

datastores.evidence: Items contain feature names and boolean flags only; no sensitive content detected
